name: Cubetto+ Playset
short_description: Screen-free coding robot playset for children aged 3+ with hands-on, Montessori-inspired learning.
long_description: Cubetto+ is a wooden, screen-free coding robot for children aged 3+ that introduces programming through tactile blocks and imaginative play. The set includes the robot, interface board, 24 coding blocks, a world map, storybook, and charging cable.

name: Transparent Map 6x6
short_description: Transparent map with pockets for themed flashcards so children can build their own adventures.
long_description: A soft-touch transparent step map with 6 x 6 pockets for inserting themed flashcards and creating custom routes, stories, and classroom activities. The map measures 100 x 100 cm with a 15 x 15 cm grid and is made from recyclable TPU.

name: Number Cards
short_description: Special cards for the transparent map that help children practice arithmetic.
long_description: A set of 36 double-sided number cards for the transparent map, covering numbers 1–20, multiples of 5, and arithmetic symbols. Designed for tactile, screen-free early numeracy activities.

name: Logic Pack
short_description: Storybooks and flashcards that extend Logic Blocks with new logical concepts and adventures.
long_description: An expansion pack for Cubetto Logic Blocks with four storybooks, 32 illustrated flash cards, and a sticker sheet. It adds guided activities for teaching logical concepts through stories and hands-on play.

name: Alphabet Cards
short_description: Special cards for the transparent map that help children practice reading and writing.
long_description: A set of 36 double-sided alphabet cards for the transparent map with uppercase and lowercase letters, including language-specific characters. Built for screen-free early literacy activities.

name: Logic Blocks
short_description: Extra coding blocks that introduce random, negation, and function concepts for Cubetto.
long_description: An expansion block set for Cubetto that introduces negation, random, and function blocks. It extends tactile coding play with more advanced sequencing and logic combinations.

name: Direction Blocks
short_description: Physical direction blocks for steering Cubetto through adventures, now including backward movement.
long_description: A tactile coding block set that includes backward, left, right, and forward commands for Cubetto. It helps children understand movement, direction, and sequencing through physical play.

name: Deep Space Adventure Map
short_description: A deep-space themed adventure map for exploring planets, the ISS, and the solar system with Cubetto.
long_description: A themed fabric adventure map that takes children through the solar system with imaginative screen-free missions. Designed to support tactile route planning, storytelling, and spatial play with Cubetto.

name: Blue Ocean Adventure Map
short_description: An ocean-themed adventure map for underwater journeys, treasures, and marine exploration.
long_description: A themed fabric map that invites children to guide Cubetto through underwater adventures featuring volcanoes, treasures, and icy seas. It supports tactile navigation and imaginative storytelling.

name: Ancient Egypt Adventure Map
short_description: A historical adventure map that takes children through pyramids, treasures, and ancient mysteries.
long_description: A themed map for Cubetto that centers on pyramids, hieroglyphics, treasures, and historical storytelling. It supports route planning and imaginative play through tactile exploration.

name: Big City Adventure Map
short_description: A city-themed adventure map with traffic, landmarks, parks, and urban routes to explore.
long_description: A themed fabric map for navigating a busy city full of streets, skyscrapers, landmarks, and markets. It encourages tactile route planning, observation, and imaginative city-based stories.
